cards.name: Mine Credit Card by ICICI Bank
cards.fee_waiver: Monthly plans: Starter Free Plan Nil; Pro 49 Plan Rs.49/month (reversed on spends of Rs.10,000 in plan cycle); Premium 149 Plan Rs.149/month (reversed on spends of Rs.20,000 in plan cycle). Charged monthly, not annually.
cards.source_section: Section I a)1. Mine Credit Card by ICICI Bank monthly plan table p.5

bank_defaults.cash_advance: 2.5% of the advance amount, subject to a minimum of ₹500
bank_defaults.cash_advance_raw: On all cards - 2.5% on advanced amount, subject to minimum transaction fee of Rs.500. Exception: ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card - Nil, ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card - Nil, ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Credit Card - Nil, Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card - Nil
bank_defaults.cash_interest: Finance charges for the revolving credit facility on retail transactions and cash advances = 3.75% per month i.e., 45% per annum. Interest is levied on all cash advances from the date of the transaction until the date of payment (no interest-free period on cash advances). The rate may vary at ICICI Bank's discretion - as low as 1.25% per month (15% per annum) and, in case of default, up to a maximum of 3.75% per month (45% per annum).
bank_defaults.late_fee_tiers: Less than Rs.100: None; Between Rs.100-Rs.500: Rs.100; Between Rs.501-Rs.1,000: Rs.500; Between Rs.1,001-Rs.5,000: Rs.600; Between Rs.5,001-Rs.10,000: Rs.750; Between Rs.10,001-Rs.25,000: Rs.900; Between Rs.25,001-Rs.50,000: Rs.1,100; More than Rs.50,000: Rs.1,300 (excluding ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card)
bank_defaults.source_section: Section I a) 2. Finance Charges (p.7); 3. Other Service Charges and Fees - Foreign currency transactions (p.8) & Cash advance (p.9); 5. Penal Charges and Fees - Late payment charges (p.18); 7. Interest-Free Period and Grace Period (p.21)
